calendar.matters:
Notice And Motion To Compel Answer To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Nov-05-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Imtiaz T. Nizam, Judgment Debtor; No appearances made by Plantifft.

RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant in the amount of $340, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
